{{CargoOrgan
|name=Night Cat Ears
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10959
|idx=152
|description="Every time I see cat ears on the black market, I weep for how many nekomimi were harmed for human fetishes."
-Neko Protection Manifesto
|skill=
|hp=2826
|def=184
|atk=190
|rush=188
|gene1=Per Apostle dominated, {race} HP +70
Apostles Dominated: 40/40
|gene2=Earth RES +90
|gene3=Upon traveling through a new area:
> Gain +6 INTEL
|gene4={race} Earth RES +1.5%
|gene5=Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +45m
|gene7=Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +2h 15m (Awakened)
|}}
